footer.tagline: TwibMotion — Free Twibbon Maker for Photos, GIFs, and Videos

home.metaTitle: TwibMotion – Free Twibbon Maker for Photos, GIFs, and Videos
home.metaDescription: TwibMotion is a free online twibbon maker that lets you create twibbons by layering frames over photos, GIFs, or videos. Export high-quality twibbons for campaigns, social media, Reels, and events in seconds.
home.heroTitle: Free Twibbon Maker – Create Twibbons for Photos, GIFs, and Videos Online
home.heroSubtitle: Layer your twibbon over photos, GIFs, or videos. Two layers. Infinite possibilities.

seoSections.howTitle: How to Create a Twibbon in Seconds
seoSections.step1Desc: Choose a photo, GIF, or video as your base layer.
seoSections.step2Desc: Upload a twibbon overlay frame and position it over your media.
seoSections.step3Desc: Download your twibbon in HD quality, ready for social media.
seoSections.useCasesTitle: Create Twibbons for Instagram, TikTok, and Social Media
seoSections.useCasesIntro: TwibMotion works for any platform and any purpose. Here are some popular ways people use twibbons.
seoSections.useIgDesc: Create vertical twibbons for Stories, Reels, and TikTok videos.
seoSections.useCampaignDesc: Design branded twibbons for awareness campaigns and movements.
seoSections.useSchoolDesc: Graduation frames, school events, and alumni campaigns.
seoSections.useEventDesc: Birthdays, weddings, independence days, and community events.
seoSections.campaignsTitle: Twibbon Maker for Campaigns, Schools, and Events
seoSections.campaignsBody1: Whether you're launching an awareness campaign, celebrating a school event, or organizing a community gathering, TwibMotion makes it easy to create professional twibbon frames that anyone can use.
seoSections.campaignsBody2: to design a frame, then share the template link so participants can apply twibbons to their own photos and videos.
seoSections.whyFastDesc: No signup required. Create twibbons instantly in your browser.
seoSections.whyVideoDesc: Go beyond static images — add twibbons to videos and GIFs.
seoSections.whyPrivacyDesc: Your media is processed locally. Nothing is uploaded to our servers.
seoSections.whyHDDesc: Export crisp, high-resolution twibbons ready for any platform.
seoSections.faq1A: A twibbon is a digital overlay or frame that you place over your profile photo or video to show support for a campaign, event, or cause.
seoSections.faq2A: Yes! TwibMotion is completely free. You can create and export twibbons without signing up or paying anything.
seoSections.faq3A: Absolutely. TwibMotion supports photos, GIFs, and videos. You can layer a twibbon frame over any media type and export it.
seoSections.faq4A: You can export twibbons as PNG images, GIF animations, or MP4 videos depending on your base media type.
seoSections.faq5Q: Do I need to install anything?
seoSections.faq5A: No. TwibMotion works entirely in your browser. No downloads or installations needed.

create.verticalTitle: Vertical Twibbon Maker 9:16 – Instagram Stories, Reels & TikTok
create.verticalDescription: Create a free 9:16 vertical twibbon for Instagram Stories, Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. Layer a frame over your photo, GIF, or video and export in HD.
create.verticalHeading: 9:16 Vertical Twibbon Maker for Stories, Reels & TikTok
create.verticalIntro: Design vertical twibbons at 1080×1920 — the native format for Instagram Stories and Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. Upload a photo, GIF, or short video, drop your twibbon frame on top, and export in HD.
create.verticalTip1: Keep important visuals in the central safe area to avoid UI overlays.
create.verticalTip2: Use transparent PNG frames so the user's media shows through cleanly.
create.verticalTip3: Short looping videos (≤30s) export as crisp MP4 files.
create.squareTitle: Square Twibbon Maker 1:1 – Instagram & Facebook Feed
create.squareDescription: Make a free 1:1 square twibbon for Instagram feed, Facebook posts, LinkedIn, and Twitter/X. Add a frame to your photo, GIF, or video and download in HD.
create.squareHeading: 1:1 Square Twibbon Maker for Feed Posts
create.squareIntro: Square 1080×1080 twibbons work across every social feed — Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and X. Perfect for awareness campaigns, profile frames, and announcements that need consistent reach.
create.squareTip1: Square frames double as profile picture overlays.
create.squareTip2: High-contrast frame edges stay readable at small thumbnail sizes.
create.squareTip3: Pair with a short caption and hashtag to amplify campaign reach.
create.landscapeTitle: Landscape Twibbon Maker 16:9 – YouTube, Events & Webinars
create.landscapeDescription: Build a free 16:9 landscape twibbon for YouTube videos, event banners, webinar overlays, and presentations. Layer a frame in HD and export instantly.
create.landscapeHeading: 16:9 Landscape Twibbon Maker for YouTube & Events
create.landscapeIntro: Landscape 1920×1080 twibbons are built for YouTube videos, livestream overlays, event banners, webinar slides, and any horizontal placement that needs HD quality.
create.landscapeTip1: Use wide frames to brand video content without covering the speaker.
create.landscapeTip2: Export MP4 to keep motion graphics looping smoothly.
create.landscapeTip3: Pair the twibbon with a campaign hashtag in the lower third.

exportDlg.title: Export
exportDlg.noCreditsLeft: No credits left. Exports will include a watermark.
exportDlg.animatedDesc: Your composition contains video or GIF. Export as MP4 or GIF below. GIF is capped at 720p / 15 seconds.

share.title: Share as Template
share.signinNotice: You need to sign in to share templates.
share.missingTwibbonDesc: Upload a twibbon frame (top layer) before sharing.
share.lockPositionDesc: Users can't move the twibbon frame
share.lockMediaDesc: Users can't replace the twibbon frame
share.allowRotationDesc: Users can rotate their uploaded photo
share.yourLink: Your template is live! Share this link:

upgrade.title: Upgrade to Premium
upgrade.desc: Video & GIF export is available for Premium users. Upgrade for unlimited exports and no watermark.
